meta.source: NTDS Hospital Events (STRUCTURED) — CDC SUTI 1a Jan 2019

exclusions.gate_name: Exclude if CAUTI / UTI present on arrival
exclusions.reason: UTI or CAUTI documented as present on arrival or prior to admission.

exclusions.gate_name: Exclude if chronic / long-term indwelling catheter (pre-admission)
exclusions.reason: Chronic or long-term indwelling urinary catheter documented prior to admission; not a hospital-acquired device.

gates.fail_reason: No documentation of UTI or CAUTI diagnosis.

gates.gate_name: Indwelling urinary catheter in place >2 calendar days (duration documented)
gates.fail_reason: No documentation of urinary catheter in place for >2 calendar days (requires explicit duration language — catheter day 3+, >48h, or equivalent).

gates.gate_name: Signs or symptoms present (fever >38C, suprapubic tenderness, CVA pain, urgency, frequency, dysuria)
gates.fail_reason: No signs or symptoms meeting CDC SUTI 1a criteria (fever >38C, suprapubic tenderness, CVA pain/tenderness, urgency, frequency, dysuria).
No urine culture with bacterial count >=10^5 CFU/ml documented.

gates.gate_name: Onset of symptoms after arrival to ED/hospital
gates.fail_reason: Cannot confirm onset of UTI symptoms after arrival (missing or unclear timestamp/context).
